Release Notes for VL53L9CX

Copyright © 2026 STMicroelectronics

Purpose

The VL53L9CX component driver provides allows to configure and retrieve data from the sensor through a simple interface.

Initial release.

NTR

Development toolchains and compilers

  • IAR System Workbench V9.60.3
  • ARM Keil V5.38

Supported devices and boards

Backward compatibility
